_patch_meta.cluster_stamp_note: Reg 30 (contrition) reinstatement pending. Cluster stamp deferred.
_patch_meta.description: Dimension Review C13 Reg 135 (repentance): 14 groups assigned. 9 dimension corrections — 7 non-standard labels from prior sessions corrected to standard vocabulary. 1 Session D pointer (DIM-135-SD001). Registry stamp set. Cluster stamp NOT included.
